sections.paragraph:
Original: כּליה

Transliteration: kilyâh

Phonetic: kil-yaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. kidneys
    1. of physical organ (literally)
    2. of seat of emotion and affection (figuratively)
    3. of sacrificial animals
  2. (TWOT) reins

Origin: from H3627 (only pl.)

TWOT entry: 983a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
